message:
refactor(test): use named functions in framer-motion mocks

Both OperatorsClient.test.tsx and jargon.test.tsx use mocked versions
of framer-motion to avoid animation timing issues in tests. This change
refactors those mocks to use named function components.

Changes:
- Extract forwardRef callbacks into named MockDiv/MockSpan/MockP functions
- Convert AnimatePresence mock to named MockAnimatePresence function
- Apply consistent pattern across both test files

Benefits:
1. React DevTools: Named components show meaningful names instead of
   "Anonymous" or "ForwardRef" in the component tree
2. Stack traces: Error messages include the function name (MockDiv)
   making test failures easier to debug
3. React internals: Named functions work better with React's fiber
   reconciler and hot reloading

This is a code quality improvement with no behavioral changes to the
tests themselves.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
